flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Manhattan Area Technical College rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.7k → $9.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Manhattan Area Technical College rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.7k → $9.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Manhattan Area Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Manhattan Area Technical College are 25% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($51.9k vs $41.4k).
